items.title: ZEC drops 30% as Shielded Labs reveals more about infinite counterfeit bug
items.summary: ZEC market capitalization fell by almost $3 billion over the past 24 hours following the disclosure of a critical vulnerability, despite it being patched already.

items.title: 'Dr. Doom'-backed Atlas Capital CEO says bitcoin could crash 70% before reaching $500,000
items.summary: Backed by economist Nouriel Roubini, a long-time anti-bitcoin advocate, and known as 'Dr. Doom,' the Atlas CEO, Reza Bundy, shot a short-term warning for bitcoin but stayed bullish in the long-term.

items.title: Hyperliquid pulls back from record highs as Arthur Hayes exits position shy of $150 price target
items.summary: The crypto veteran blamed macro risks and AI mania for taking profits, drawing backlash from traders for selling well below his recent bullish forecasts.

items.title: Bitcoin steadies above $60,000 while derivatives send an unambiguous warning
items.summary: BTC crashed to $61,300 before recovering to $62,500 with $3 billion in liquidations over two days. Traders loaded up on $60,000 puts in anticipation of further declines.

items.title: Cardano slumps under 20 cents as Hoskinson says he is 'taking a break' after warning of ecosystem failures
items.summary: Hoskinson's remarks followed a string of setbacks for the ecosystem, including the cancellation of Cardano's flagship conference and the shutdown of a prominent analytics platform.

items.title: Polymarket says No for May, Yes for June after Strategy's recent bitcoin sale
items.summary: UMA voters ruled that Strategy's June 1 disclosure counted for the June contract, even though the company said it sold bitcoin during the final week of May.

items.title: Arthur Hayes dumps HYPE, NEAR as he warns of AI IPO wave
items.summary: Arthur Hayes said he dumped his HYPE and NEAR holdings after warning markets may peak before September and AI IPOs could drain liquidity.

items.title: About 67% of banned Anthropic accounts used AI to prep for cyberattacks
items.summary: AI firm Anthropic mapped a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats, finding that malicious actors are quickly becoming more dangerous with AI.

items.title: Israel’s tax authority ‘disappointed’ in voluntary crypto disclosures: Report
items.summary: After expecting billions of dollars worth of crypto holdings to be reported during a voluntary disclosure period, the country's tax office said only 58 filers took advantage of the procedure.

items.title: Here's what could happen if bitcoin breaks below $60,000
items.summary: A confluence of factors makes $60,000 as key level to watch for in the near term, according to Deribit.

items.title: Bitcoin in danger of dropping to $60,000, with Zcash bulls turning their backs on ZEC
items.summary: AI bets are recording rapid profit-taking as Broadcom as outlook for AI-chip sales fell short of high expectations, driving down crypto markets.

items.title: Bitcoin plunges to near $62,000 as the AI trade unwinds, HYPE falls 14%
items.summary: Broadcom's disappointing AI chip outlook pulled the Nasdaq lower for a third session, dragged Asian equities down with it, and took crypto along for the ride.

items.title: Zcash plummets 30% as Shielded Labs reveals a major bug that went undetected for four years
items.summary: Shielded Labs revealed that the bug could have helped an attacker print unlimited counterfeit tokens. That could have damaged trust in the token's supply and its value.

items.title: Crypto billionaires bankroll Nigel Farage's pro-crypto party
items.summary: Tether-linked billionaire Christopher Harborne and BitMEX co-founder Ben Delo donated $9.4 million to Nigel Farage’s Reform UK in the first quarter.

items.title: Strategy’s leveraged Bitcoin model has faced its first stress test: Grayscale
items.summary: “Less Bitcoin on levered DAT balance sheets and more on diversified corporate balance sheets will be a positive,” said Grayscale’s head of research, Zach Pandl.

items.title: Anthropic says self-improving AI may be closer than expected
items.summary: Companies have been developing AI very quickly to stay ahead of the market, but  Favaro and Clark argue that a slowdown would allow more time to deal with the technology’s implications.

items.title: Senate Republicans push finance watchdogs to clarify crypto capital rules
items.summary: Senator Cynthia Lummis has led a group of lawmakers urging financial regulators for “fair capital treatment for on-balance sheet treatment of digital assets.”

items.title: Crypto Clarity Act in spotlight for bad-actor provisions as Senate process grinds forward
items.summary: The industry has been trying to make a case this week the Clarity Act provides law enforcement strong tools to combat illicit finance involving cryptocurrency.

items.title: OCC chief says Democrats applying sole political pressure in World Liberty charter choice
items.summary: The regulator rejected claims he's doing President Trump's bidding during a congressional hearing that also addressed the GENIUS Act stablecoin push.

items.title: Crypto for Advisors: The crypto due diligence questions you forgot to ask
items.summary: As stablecoins, shifting regulation and AI-enabled infrastructure mature, advisors should revisit three questions their crypto due diligence may no longer fully cover.
